text.message: I'm strapping in for a bumpy one
red, why did you road to my knight instead of a place to settle?
ya could have gone toward the 12.
I have 5 settlements out my dude
Have to city up before I can settle again
but your road is also limited too
and i assume you'd like to city.
Orange only came in to ruin my game and make an epic exit. xD
